summary: Reportes Producción P0 Module - All 9 backend endpoints and 7 frontend pages fully tested and working. Backend: 37/37 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly with proper data display, charts, tables, filters, and navigation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/dashboard returns 200 with all KPIs
Backend: Dashboard has required fields (total_en_proceso, atrasados, distribucion_estado_op, por_servicio)
Backend: Dashboard KPIs have correct types (int for counts, list for distributions)
Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/en-proceso returns 200 with registros array
Backend: En proceso supports estado and modelo_id filters
Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/wip-etapa returns 200 with etapas array
Backend: WIP etapa items have correct structure (etapa, lotes, prendas, urgentes)
Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/atrasados returns 200 with registros array
Backend: Atrasados registros have atraso info (entrega_vencida, movs_vencidos, dias_atraso_entrega)
Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/trazabilidad/{id} returns 404 for invalid ID
Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/trazabilidad/{id} returns 200 with registro, movimientos, divisiones
Backend: Trazabilidad movimientos have correct structure (servicio_nombre, persona_nombre, cantidad_enviada)
Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/cumplimiento-ruta returns 200 with registros array
Backend: Cumplimiento ruta registros have compliance info (pct_cumplimiento, detalle_etapas)
Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/balance-terceros returns 200 with balance and resumen_servicio
Backend: Balance terceros items have correct structure (servicio, persona, costo_total, prendas_en_poder)
Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/lotes-fraccionados returns 200 with familias array
Backend: Lotes fraccionados familias have correct structure (padre_id, hijos, total_familia_prendas)
Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/filtros returns 200 with servicios, rutas, modelos, estados
Backend: All endpoints require authentication (return 401 without token)
Frontend: /reportes/dashboard loads with 7 KPI cards and 2 charts
Frontend: Dashboard has 6 quick access links to other reports
Frontend: /reportes/en-proceso loads with table and filters (estado, modelo)
Frontend: En proceso shows 4 registros with Trazabilidad buttons
Frontend: /reportes/wip-etapa loads with bar chart and table
Frontend: WIP etapa shows 3 etapas with lotes, prendas, % distribution
Frontend: /reportes/atrasados loads with table showing 2 overdue lots
Frontend: Atrasados shows motivo atraso and dias atraso badges
Frontend: /reportes/trazabilidad/:id loads with timeline of 3 movimientos
Frontend: Trazabilidad shows tallas, ruta esperada, and 'Abrir Registro' button
Frontend: /reportes/cumplimiento-ruta loads with progress bars and etapas visualization
Frontend: Cumplimiento ruta shows 3 registros with completion percentages
Frontend: /reportes/balance-terceros loads with chart and detailed table
Frontend: Balance terceros shows 6 rows with servicio, persona, costos
Frontend: /reportes/lotes-fraccionados loads with 1 familia card
Frontend: Lotes fraccionados shows padre (04) and hijo (04-1) with prendas
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Reportes Producción' section with 7 navigation items
Frontend: All sidebar navigation items work correctly
critical_code_review_comments: All 9 backend endpoints are well-structured with proper error handling and data validation
Frontend components use data-testid attributes for testing (kpi-en-proceso, filter-estado, etc.)
Charts use recharts library with proper responsive containers
Sidebar navigation properly organized under 'Reportes Producción' section
Trazabilidad timeline shows movimientos with status indicators (Completado, En curso, Vencido)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: 3 registros EN_PROCESO (02, 03, 04), 1 fraccionado (04 -> 04-1), registro 02 has 3 movimientos for trazabilidad
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reportes Producción P0 module fully implemented and tested. All 9 backend endpoints working: dashboard, en-proceso, wip-etapa, atrasados, trazabilidad/{id}, cumplimiento-ruta, balance-terceros, lotes-fraccionados, filtros. All 7 frontend pages working with proper data display, charts, filters, and navigation. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_reportes_produccion.py with 37 tests.
